queries.question: When did the latest sale begin for the pop concerts?
queries.sql: SELECT MAX(start_time) FROM On_Sale_Date JOIN Events ON Events.event_id = On_Sale_Date.event_id JOIN Artists ON Artists.artist_id = Events.artist_id WHERE genre = "Pop";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?start_time_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?on_sale_date a :On_Sale_Date .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?on_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?events p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?artists p:genre ?genre_f .
  ?on_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
}

queries.question: When did the latest sale begin for the pop concerts?
queries.sql: SELECT MAX(start_time) FROM Pre_sale_Date JOIN Events ON Events.event_id = Pre_sale_Date.event_id JOIN Artists ON Artists.artist_id = Events.artist_id WHERE genre = "Pop";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?start_time_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?pre_sale_date a :Pre_sale_Date .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?pre_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?events p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?artists p:genre ?genre_f .
  ?pre_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
}

queries.question: When did the latest sale begin for the pop concerts?
queries.sql: SELECT MAX(Pre_sale_Date.start_time), MAX(On_Sale_Date.start_time) FROM On_Sale_Date JOIN Events ON Events.event_id = On_Sale_Date.event_id JOIN Pre_sale_Date ON Events.event_id = Pre_sale_Date.event_id JOIN Artists ON Artists.artist_id = Events.artist_id WHERE genre = "Pop";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?start_time_a) AS ?agg) (MAX(?start_time_a2) AS ?agg2) WHERE {
  ?on_sale_date a :On_Sale_Date .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?on_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?pre_sale_date a :Pre_sale_Date .
  ?pre_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?events p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?artists p:genre ?genre_f .
  ?pre_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a .
  ?on_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a2 .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
}

queries.question: Show the average sale duration for seat A1 based on the pre-sale date.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(end_time - start_time) FROM Pre_sale_Date JOIN Tickets ON Tickets.Presale_Date_ID = Pre_sale_Date.presale_id WHERE seat_number = "A1";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (AVG(?diff) AS ?a) WHERE { ?t a :Tickets ; p:seat_number ?sn ; p:hasPre_sale_Date ?ps . ?ps p:start_time ?st ; p:end_time ?et . BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?et),1,2)) - xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?st),1,2)) AS ?diff) FILTER(STR(?sn)="A1") }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): AVG(end_time-start_time) on 'HH:MM' strings (MySQL leading-int coercion) -> AVG

queries.question: Calculate the average duration of sales for seat A1.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(end_time - start_time) FROM On_Sale_Date JOIN Tickets ON Tickets.ON_SALE_DATE_ID = On_Sale_Date.sale_id WHERE seat_number = "A1";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (AVG(?diff) AS ?a) WHERE { ?t a :Tickets ; p:seat_number ?sn ; p:hasOn_Sale_Date ?os . ?os p:start_time ?st ; p:end_time ?et . BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?et),1,2)) - xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?st),1,2)) AS ?diff) FILTER(STR(?sn)="A1") }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): AVG(end-start) On_Sale_Date 'HH:MM'; seat A1

queries.question: Calculate the average duration of sales for seat A1.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(Pre_sale_Date.end_time - Pre_sale_Date.start_time), AVG(On_Sale_Date.end_time - On_Sale_Date.start_time) FROM On_Sale_Date JOIN Tickets ON Tickets.ON_SALE_DATE_ID = On_Sale_Date.sale_id JOIN Pre_sale_Date ON Pre_sale_Date.presale_id = Tickets.Presale_Date_ID WHERE seat_number = "A1";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (AVG(?pd) AS ?pavg) (AVG(?od) AS ?oavg) WHERE { ?t a :Tickets ; p:seat_number ?sn ; p:hasPre_sale_Date ?ps ; p:hasOn_Sale_Date ?os . ?ps p:start_time ?pst ; p:end_time ?pet . ?os p:start_time ?ost ; p:end_time ?oet . BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?pet),1,2)) - xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?pst),1,2)) AS ?pd) BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?oet),1,2)) - xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?ost),1,2)) AS ?od) FILTER(STR(?sn)="A1") }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): two AVG(hour-diff) over 3-way join (ticket A1 -> presale & onsale)

ambiguous_dsl.question: When did the latest sale begin for the pop concerts?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT (MAX(?start_time_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?pre_sale_date a :Pre_sale_Date .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?pre_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?events p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?artists p:genre ?genre_f .
  ?pre_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT (MAX(?start_time_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?on_sale_date a :On_Sale_Date .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?on_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?events p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?artists p:genre ?genre_f .
  ?on_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
} }
  full: { SELECT (MAX(?start_time_a) AS ?agg) (MAX(?start_time_a2) AS ?agg2) WHERE {
  ?on_sale_date a :On_Sale_Date .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?on_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?pre_sale_date a :Pre_sale_Date .
  ?pre_sale_date p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?events p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?artists p:genre ?genre_f .
  ?pre_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a .
  ?on_sale_date p:start_time ?start_time_a2 .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Pop")
} }
}
